file_title: Amplifying Online Sales: A Youth-Centric Approach
introduction: This presentation aims to explore strategies to boost our online sales by engaging younger consumers. We will also discuss how we can differentiate Lee's Market in the highly competitive Canadian retail industry.

subsections.heading: Understanding The Younger Consumer Market
subsections.content:
• Our analysis from Q3 2024 to Q3 2025 reveals that our younger demographic (18-35) has a repeat purchase rate of approximately 35%.
• The average time a younger customer takes to make a repeat purchase is approximately 30 days.
• The data focused on retention and repeat purchase trends amongst our younger consumers.
• By establishing a baseline of these trends, we can gauge the effectiveness of our current digital engagement and loyalty strategies.
• The data serves as a foundation for setting realistic targets, such as a 25% increase in customer retention by Q1 2026.
• The metrics also help point out which initiatives have the most significant impact on repeat customer behavior.
• Utilizing this data, we can refine our strategies to boost online sales by 20% by targeting this demographic and differentiating ourselves from competitors.
subsections.justification: This content provides the necessary data and analysis to develop strategies to increase online sales by targeting younger consumers.

subsections.heading: E-commerce Trends and Dominant Players
subsections.content:
• Global e-commerce sales growth from 2000 to 2020
• Dominant e-commerce players in the US and China
• Analysis of Amazon's business model
• Overview of Alibaba's expansion strategy in Asia
• Comparison between eBay and Walmart's online platforms
• Evolution of Shopify's service offerings over the years
subsections.justification: The content discusses global e-commerce trends and dominant players in markets not directly relevant to Lee's Market in Canada.

subsections.heading: Crafting Lee's Market's Online Sales Strategy
subsections.content:
• Overview of Lee's Market's brick-and-mortar sales strategy
• Analysis of Lee's Market's previous marketing campaigns
• Breakdown of Lee's Market's current product mix
• Evaluation of Lee's Market's supply chain efficiency
• Overview of Lee's Market's customer service initiatives
• Review of Lee's Market's sustainability efforts
subsections.justification: The content discusses elements of Lee's Market's business that are not directly related to boosting online sales or targeting younger consumers.

conclusion: By understanding the younger consumer's behaviors and current e-commerce trends, we can tailor our online sales strategy to effectively increase sales and set Lee's Market apart. Let's proceed with the strategic implementation and continuously monitor our performance against set targets.
